zh.Bewsey Hall, Warrington, Lancashire, Eng: 英國藍卡爾貝福 霍爾
zh.Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾貝福 霍爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alberic Pincerna le Boteler於1195年出生在英國藍卡爾貝福 霍爾時，他的父親William Pincerna le Boteler35歲，母親Ada de Workington44歲。他於大約1220年與Lady Alicia Garnet Baroness of Warrington在英國藍卡爾沃林頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1235年9月14日在他的家鄉享年40歲。

zh-hans.Bewsey Hall, Warrington, Lancashire, Eng: 英国藍卡爾貝福 霍爾
zh-hans.Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾貝福 霍爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alberic Pincerna le Boteler于1195年出生在英国藍卡爾貝福 霍爾时，他的父亲William Pincerna le Boteler35岁，母亲Ada de Workington44岁。他于大约1220年与Lady Alicia Garnet Baroness of Warrington在英国藍卡爾沃林頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1235年9月14日在他的家乡享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Thanh, Hung, Minh, Dung, Tuan, Hai, Hoa, Thuy, Son, Anh, Long, Hoang.  Chinese Hong, Sang, Chi, Dong, Tong, Lai, Hang, Man, Han, Ho, Phoung, Chan.  Korean Tam, Phong, Nam, Thai, Tuong, Chung, Thach, Tinh, Manh, Tham, Uyen, Vang.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 樂, meaning ‘happiness’ in Chinese: from the first element of the personal name Le Fu (樂父), style name of Yan, son of the Duke Dai of Song (ruler of the state of Song, reigned 799–766  BC ). Yan's grandson Le Ju (樂莒) inherited Le (樂) as his surname.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 勒: (i) from the second element of the placename Shu-Le (疏勒), an ancient state (located in present-day Xinjiang Uyghur autonomous region) during the Western Han dynasty (206  BC –25  AD ). (ii) a surname near the Bohai Sea region during the Han dynasty (206  BC –220  AD ). (iii) a surname traced back to the Hun ethnic group in northern China during the Jin dynasty (265–420  AD ).

variants.name: Yue
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Chi, Feng, Gang, Wei, Chun, Guo, Jin, Kin, Ping, Yan, Yun, Zhang, Chau, Du, Hau, Hung, My, Sau.

Mandarin form of the surname 岳 (or 嶽), meaning ‘high mountain’ in Chinese: traced back to Si Yue (四岳 or 四嶽), said to be the title of an official post in charge of sacrificial rituals on the site of famous mountains during the reign of the legendary Emperor Yao (c. 24th century BC ) and Emperor Shun (c. 23rd century BC ).

variants.name: Lok
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ping, Tat, Wing, Ying Lin, Chi Ming, Ching Wah, Chun, Chung Man, Han, Kam, Kam Tim, Kin.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 樂, see   Le   1.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 陸, 鹿, 逯 and 禄, see   Lu   5 and (7-9).

variants.name: Li
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ming, Li, Jian, Hong, Yan, Ping, Jing, Yong, Ying, Hui, Jin, Min, Chung.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 李, meaning ‘plum’: (i) said to have been adopted in place of the Chinese surname 理 (also pronounced Li; meaning ‘rules’ in Chinese) by Li Zhen (利貞), son of an official called Li Zheng (理徵) in the late Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). It is said that Li Zhen's father incurred the displeasure of King Zhou of Shang (died 1046  BC ) and Li Zhen fled to a wasteland area, where he survived on wild plums. After his return to civilization, he changed his surname to Li (李 ‘plum’), a word with the same pronunciation. The original surname, 理, is said to be from Li Guan (理官), the name of a post of officials in charge of legislation in ancient China. Li Er (李耳), also known as Lao Tzu or Lao Zi, traditionally regarded as the founder of Taoism, is believed to have been a descendant of Li Zhen. (ii) adopted as a surname by the Chi Li (叱李) family from the Xianbei ethnic group during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) in the early years of the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ), sixteen high officials with different surnames were granted the surname Li (李), the surname of the royal family of the Tang dynasty, by Emperor Taizong of Tang (died 649  BC ), because of their contributions to the establishment of the Tang regime. (iv) the surname can also be traced back to several minority ethnic groups in ancient China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 黎, meaning ‘black’ or ‘multitude’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from Li (黎), the name of an ancient state (located in Changzhi in Shanxi province) during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ), which was annexed in the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ) and later granted to Fengshu, also known as Li Hou (黎侯, 'Marquis Li'). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Su Li (素黎) family, members of the Xianbei ethnic group, during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Boteler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of leather bottles, from an agent derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bouteille ‘bottle’.

nameMeanings.name: Alberic
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Learned form of Aubrey , derived from Latin Albericus in the 14th century. It enjoyed a slight and brief vogue in the 19th century, but is now rare.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Alberic Pincerna le Boteler was born in 1195, in Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England, his father, William Pincerna le Boteler, was 35 and his mother, Ada de Workington, was 44. He married Lady Alicia Garnet Baroness of Warrington about 1220, in Warrington, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 14 September 1235, in his hometown, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alberic Pincerna le Boteler est né en 1195, à Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William Pincerna le Boteler, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Ada de Workington, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alicia Garnet Baroness of Warrington environ 1220, à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 14 septembre 1235, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alberic Pincerna le Boteler 1195 in Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Pincerna le Boteler 35 und seine Mutter Ada de Workington 44. Er hat um 1220 in Warrington, Lancashire, England Lady Alicia Garnet Baroness of Warrington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 14. September 1235 im Alter von 40 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alberic Pincerna le Boteler è nato il nel 1195 nel Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, William Pincerna le Boteler, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Ada de Workington, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alicia Garnet Baroness of Warrington circa 1220, nel Warrington, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 14 settembre 1235, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alberic Pincerna le Botelerが1195年にイギリスランカシュアイアベウセイ ハルで生まれた時，父William Pincerna le Botelerは35歳，母Ada de Workingtonは44歳であった。約1220年にイギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンでLady Alicia Garnet Baroness of Warringtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1235年9月14日に故郷で40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alberic Pincerna le Boteler(이)가 1195년 영국 랭카실르 뷰시 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Pincerna le Boteler(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Ada de Workington(은)는 44세였다. 그는 대략 1220년 영국 랭카실르 워링턴에서 Lady Alicia Garnet Baroness of Warrington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1235년 9월 14일 그의 고향에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alberic Pincerna le Boteler nasceu em 1195, em Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Pincerna le Boteler, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Ada de Workington, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alicia Garnet Baroness of Warrington aproximadamente 1220, em Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 14 de setembro de 1235, em sua cidade natal, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alberic Pincerna le Boteler родился в 1195 г. в местности бюси холл, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Pincerna le Boteler было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Ada de Workington, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alicia Garnet Baroness of Warrington около 1220 г. в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 14 сентября 1235 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alberic Pincerna le Boteler nació en 1195, en Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Pincerna le Boteler, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Ada de Workington, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Lady Alicia Garnet Baroness of Warrington aproximadamente 1220, en Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 14 de septiembre de 1235, en su pueblo, a la edad de 40 años.
